states.name: proposed
states.description: Deletion/reference analysis is being assembled; no destructive authority exists.
entry_requirements: Target Content and requested action are recorded.

states.name: blocked
states.description: Retained references, policy, legal hold, insufficient replicas or missing evidence block deletion.
entry_requirements: At least one blocking reason/reference is retained.

states.name: authorized
states.description: Reference, retention, legal-hold and verified-replica checks passed for the exact action/scope.
entry_requirements: No blockers remain; authority, policy and dry-run Receipt exist.

states.name: executed
states.description: Authorized deletion action completed and was observed/read back.
entry_requirements: Execution Receipt and post-action observation exist.

states.name: failed
states.description: Authorized deletion attempt failed or produced uncertain/partial effects.
entry_requirements: Failure/uncertainty and remaining Locations are retained.

states.name: expired
states.description: Decision authorization or underlying analysis expired before execution.

states.name: superseded
states.description: A newer deletion decision replaces this one while history remains.

required_preconditions: Exact target Content/Locations and requested action are known.
One or more blockers are retained.
Reference/retention/legal-hold analysis passes; no blockers remain; dry run is receipted.
Authorization is current and exact Location/Content scope matches.
Failure or uncertain partial effect is retained.
Decision or analysis validity expired before execution.
Replacement decision exists and this record remains retained.
